title: iFealClear 2 Set Stainless Steel 3-in-1 Kitchen Drain Stopper & Strainer Set, Replacement for Food Waste Catcher, Odour-Proof & Leak-Proof, Fits Sink Holes 72-86 mm, Depth > 28 mm (Black)
features: [Pure Stainless Steel Durability] Crafted from high-grade 304 stainless steel, this kitchen sink plug (ideal as a kitchen sink plug replacement) offers unbeatable durability and rust resistance, great for busy British kitchens. Sleek pure black finish complements all kitchen styles, pairs with a kitchen sink strainer, and its timeless design ensures long-lasting performance while elevating your sink area.

[3-in-1 Functional Efficiency] This kitchen sink plug acts as a true all-rounder, combining the roles of a reliable stopper and a kitchen sink strainer to excel in key tasks: holding water, draining efficiently, trapping food scraps, and sealing odours. Its clever design eliminates the need for separate tools, making it a practical choice for those seeking kitchen sink plug replacement that simplifies daily chores.

[Universal Compatibility for UK Sinks] Designed to fit most standard UK kitchen sinks, this 3-in-1 kitchen sink plug (a versatile kitchen sink plugs replacement option) works with drainage holes where the top diameter is less than 86mm (3.4 inches), the bottom diameter exceeds 72mm (2.8 inches), and depth is over 28mm (1.1 inches). It pairs seamlessly with a kitchen sink strainer, ensuring a snug fit for all sink types.

[Advanced Leak-Proof Seal] Fitted with high-quality sealing rings, this kitchen sink plug (a dependable kitchen sink plug replacement) creates a tight, reliable seal, even when used alongside a kitchen sink strainer to trap debris. It maintains consistent performance with frequent use, keeping worktops dry and preventing spills.

[Effortless Maintenance] Cleaning and caring for this kitchen sink plug replacement couldn't be easier. Its detachable design, similar to a kitchen sink strainer, lets you take it apart quickly to rinse away scraps. With minimal effort, it stays in pristine condition, outperforming cheaper kitchen sink plugs prone to grime buildup.
